feat(config): support shell command values with `!` prefix (#200)

* Initial plan

* fix(config): redact cmd and stderr from error messages to prevent secret leakage

* refactor(config): remove cfg guards and dead stderr capture from resolve_value

* docs(config): remove inaccurate Unix-only platform callout

commit.message:
fix: incremental result saving + thinking token stripping + keyword fixes

- Write each run report immediately after completion (resilient to crashes)
- Generate rolling research_progress.md every 4 configs
- Strip <think>...</think> blocks from qwen3.5 responses
- Fix overly-strict expected keywords (e=mc2, 384400, boj, netherlands, france)
- Fix system prompt to allow general knowledge answers
- Fix duration turn keyword to just '6'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: KG-Testing
repository.description: Knowledge Graph testing harness for AI Agent memory evaluation

commit.message:
test: add shared fixtures and improve test infrastructure (#105)

- Add project-wide tests/conftest.py with common path fixtures,
  seed reset, mocks, and skip marks (skip_if_missing_testdata,
  skip_if_no_gpu)
- Implement --use-gpu pytest option via pytest_addoption and
  use_gpu fixture so the gpu_compatible marker is functional
- Guard all CUDA calls in reset_seed behind torch.cuda.is_available()
  to prevent failures in CPU-only environments
- Add CLI-specific tests/mussel/cli/conftest.py with test_data_path_cli
  alias fixture
- Register gpu_compatible marker in pyproject.toml

Addresses review comments:
- No unused heavy imports at collection time
- --use-gpu flag properly registered via pytest_addoption
- CUDA API calls guarded for CPU-only torch installs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: initial implementation of KG testing harness

- 4 graph types: Simple, Hierarchical, Multi, WeightedGraph
- 5 multi-turn test scenarios (54 total turns)
- Ollama client with qwen3.5:4b + thinking token stripping
- Context manager with sliding window (forces KG use)
- KG-augmented agent with label/tag search and neighbor expansion
- Test runner with keyword accuracy evaluation
- Markdown reporter for per-run and summary reports
- Research matrix builder for full parameter sweep
- Initial quick test: 98.3% accuracy across 54 turns

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: WebAuthn registration for iOS passkeys (Face ID)

- Set ResidentKey to 'preferred' for discoverable credential support
  (required for iOS Passwords/Keychain passkey storage)
- Auto-detect request origin and add to RPOrigins dynamically so
  the origin validation passes when accessing from mobile devices
- Support comma-separated WEBAUTHN_ORIGIN for multiple origins
- Pre-read request body to prevent double-consumption issue
- Include transports and authenticatorAttachment in attestation response
- Add structured error logging for WebAuthn ceremonies

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: JUVOJustin <30726576+JUVOJustin@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs: tighten test examples in application testing guide

Co-authored-by: JUVOJustin <30726576+JUVOJustin@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: harden phpunit setup and activate CI test job

- Activate test-application CI job (was commented out)
- Remove deprecated phpunit.xml.dist attributes
- Add tests/php/ExampleTest.php as working smoke test
- Use container phpunit directly in test:php script (no Composer wrapper)
- Restore yoast/phpunit-polyfills as explicit dep (WordPress test bootstrap requirement)
- Remove phpunit/phpunit and wp-phpunit/wp-phpunit (provided by container and polyfills)
- Simplify bootstrap.php: drop non-wp-env fallback, fail fast with clear message
- Update testing docs: wp-env-exclusive constraint, tests-cli rationale, configuration notes

* ci: run application tests after static analysis passes

Exit early benefit: avoid spinning up Docker/wp-env when PHPStan
or lint already failed. Cache keys still resolve via needs: setup.

* docs: update github-actions doc with test-application job and stage structure

* chore: fix gitignore and distignore for phpunit artifacts

- Add phpunit.xml and .phpunit.result.cache to .gitignore
- Add phpunit.xml to .distignore
- Remove stale Cypress test entries from .gitignore

* docs: add plugin dependencies section to testing guide

* feat: add application-testing skill for writing PHPUnit tests

* chore: remove redundant namespace lookup guidance from testing skill

* docs: add application-testing skill to work-with-ai, add factory rollback note to testing

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: konarsubhojit <20913717+konarsubhojit@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remove --recreate flag breaking PowerShell 5 line continuation in postprovision hook

The commented-out #  --recreate line inside a backtick-continued PowerShell
command broke the continuation chain in PowerShell 5. When azd falls back
from pwsh (PS7) to powershell (PS5), the comment terminates continuation,
causing --search-endpoint to be parsed as a standalone statement with an
invalid unary operator.

Removed --recreate from both Windows (pwsh) and posix (sh) hooks.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use platform authenticator for WebAuthn to enable Face ID/Touch ID

Changed AuthenticatorAttachment from CrossPlatform (security keys only)
to Platform (biometrics built into the device). This ensures iOS Face ID,
Touch ID, and Android fingerprint are offered instead of prompting for an
external security key.

Note: existing credentials registered as cross-platform must be deleted
and re-registered after this change.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: coin-collection-app
repository.description: A simple application to track one's coin collection

commit.message:
feat: add refresh token auth and WebAuthn biometric login

- Replace 72-hour access tokens with 15-minute access + 30-day rolling
  refresh tokens for seamless session persistence
- Add POST /auth/refresh endpoint that issues new token pairs and
  revokes the old refresh token
- Add frontend axios interceptor that silently refreshes expired access
  tokens, queuing concurrent requests during refresh
- Implement WebAuthn/FIDO2 backend with go-webauthn library for
  Face ID, Touch ID, and fingerprint authentication
- Add registration and login ceremony endpoints under /auth/webauthn
- Add biometric login button to LoginPage with automatic detection
  of registered credentials and last-used username memory
- Add biometric credential management to SettingsPage (register,
  list, remove)
- Add RefreshToken and WebAuthnCredential database models
- Configure WEBAUTHN_RP_ID and WEBAUTHN_ORIGIN via environment variables
- Update Swagger types to include refreshToken in AuthResponse

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: coin-collection-app

commit.message:
feat: implement CLI tool and Terraform provider

Add the Showbiz CLI (cli/) built with Cobra and the Terraform provider
(terraform/) built with the Terraform Plugin Framework. Both wrap the
Go SDK.

CLI commands: auth, org, project, connection, resource, iam, provider,
config, and shell completion. Supports --output json and --no-color.

Terraform resources: showbiz_project, showbiz_connection,
showbiz_resource, showbiz_iam_policy, showbiz_policy_attachment.
Data sources: showbiz_project, showbiz_connection, showbiz_resource,
showbiz_provider. All resources support terraform import.

Also adds UpdateOrgPolicy to the Go SDK and updates docs.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove duplicate particle t increment in AnimatedGridMap tick

Particles were advancing p.t twice per simulation tick, causing them to
move at double speed. Removed the second redundant increment inside the
forEach guard block.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: UrjaRakshak
repository.description: It is a Physics-Aware Energy Integrity & Grid Intelligence Platform designed to protect electricity infrastructure from losses, instability, degradation, and organized misuse - without surveilling individuals or exploiting consumer data. It is a decision-support system grounded in electrical engineering, uncertainty-aware AI, and ethical restraint.

commit.message:
feat: add new frontend components, pages, and Zustand store

- store/useAppStore.ts: Zustand store for live metrics, recent events,
  and selected substation state

- components/charts/LossTrendChart.tsx: Recharts AreaChart showing
  residual loss % with confidence band (cyan/amber, dark theme)
- components/charts/LossBreakdownChart.tsx: Horizontal Recharts BarChart
  for component-level loss breakdown with per-bar custom colours
- components/charts/EnergyFlowSankey.tsx: Custom SVG Sankey diagram
  visualising Generation→Transmission→Distribution→Consumption flows
  with gradient paths and glow effects
- components/charts/ConfidenceHeatmap.tsx: Custom SVG heatmap (substation
  × hour) with red→green colour scale and interactive CSS tooltips

- components/grid/AnimatedGridMap.tsx: D3 force-directed topology graph
  with animated transmission particles, pulsing node rings, health-colour
  coding, drag support, and hover tooltips. Loaded client-side via
  next/dynamic to avoid SSR issues.

- components/ui/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable metric card using .metric-card
  CSS class, framer-motion spring-animated value, delta indicator
- components/ui/StatusBadge.tsx: Maps all balance/health status strings
  to appropriate chip CSS classes

- app/grid/page.tsx: Grid Topology page with AnimatedGridMap, regional
  filter buttons, summary MetricCards, and mock Indian grid data
- app/ai-chat/page.tsx: AI Chat page with streaming typewriter responses,
  quick-prompt chips, configurable substation ID, and SSE fallback
- app/history/page.tsx: Analysis History page with searchable table,
  status filter dropdown, pagination, and slide-in detail side panel

- CommandBar: added Grid Map, History, and AI Chat navigation links

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: UrjaRakshak
repository.description: It is a Physics-Aware Energy Integrity & Grid Intelligence Platform designed to protect electricity infrastructure from losses, instability, degradation, and organized misuse - without surveilling individuals or exploiting consumer data. It is a decision-support system grounded in electrical engineering, uncertainty-aware AI, and ethical restraint.

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: konarsubhojit <20913717+konarsubhojit@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add python-backend/ — reorganised FastAPI service with physics engine

Introduces a clean python-backend/ directory that reorganises the existing
backend/ Python FastAPI service with a more modular package layout.

Structure
- app/main.py           FastAPI app; CORS reads ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var,
                        lifespan handles DB init/shutdown, /health endpoint
- app/physics/engine.py Standalone physics engine with real formulas:
                          calculate_transformer_loss (IEEE two-part model)
                          calculate_line_loss (I²R Joule heating)
                          analyze_energy_balance (full residual analysis)
                          classify_balance_status
- app/api/v1/analysis.py POST /analyze, GET /history, GET /{id}
- app/api/v1/grid.py    GET /topology, /regions, /substations
- app/api/v1/stream.py  SSE /events/{substation_id} + POST /ingest
- app/api/v1/ai.py      POST /interpret/{id}, GET /status, GET /ghi/dashboard
- app/schemas/models.py All Pydantic v2 request/response models
- app/db/config.py      Async SQLAlchemy; Supabase/SQLite detection;
                        SQLite-safe version query
- app/middleware/auth.py JWT Bearer dependency; raises at startup if
                        JWT_SECRET_KEY is default in production
- app/ai/claude_service.py Claude/OpenAI wrapper with offline fallback
- app/utils/helpers.py  Utility functions
- app/tests/test_physics.py  31 pytest tests (all passing)
- alembic/              Async migration env + script template
- requirements.txt, Dockerfile, .env.example, pytest.ini, alembic.ini

Also fixes nodejs-backend default PYTHON_BACKEND_URL to port 8001 to
match the python-backend default port.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Node.js Express + TypeScript backend (MERN stack)

- Express app with CORS, Helmet, Morgan, rate limiting
- MongoDB/Mongoose models: User (with bcrypt), GridEvent
- JWT auth middleware + role-based access control
- Controllers: auth (register/login/me), grid topology/metrics, metrics dashboard/history
- Socket.io with JWT auth, per-substation rooms, mock 5s live broadcasts
- Redis cache service (best-effort, degrades gracefully)
- Python FastAPI proxy service (axios)
- Winston structured logger
- Zod request validation
- Multi-stage Dockerfile (node:20-alpine)
- Bumped mongoose to 8.9.5, axios to 1.13.5 to fix advisory vulnerabilities
